name: SomArchon
description: Soma-targeted Archon1 variant designed for population voltage imaging.

kinetics.note: Monoexponential rising time constant 0.6 ms and decay time constant 1.1 ms, stated in the main text. Measured in vivo in awake head-fixed mouse hippocampal CA1 (physiological brain temperature ~37°C). The original SomArchon paper (Piatkevich 2019) reported only that kinetics were comparable to Archon1 (Fig. 1e FWHM_AP), without explicit time constants. (Temperature was previously listed as 32°C, carried over from Archon1's in vitro value; corrected to physiological since this is an in vivo awake-mouse measurement.)

dynamicRangeData.note: Highest relative ΔF/F during 100-mV voltage steps (cortex, 1P widefield voltage-clamp, λex=637 nm, n=12 neurons from 2 mice). Read from the ΔF/F-vs-V plot in Fig. 1g (normalized to −70 mV).

sensitivityData.note: ΔF/F per AP, cortex layer 2/3 brain slice, 1P widefield, λex=637 nm. From Fig. 1d (per-region values for cortex/hippocampus/striatum are 45/42/35%).
ΔF/F per AP, hippocampus brain slice, 1P widefield, λex=637 nm.
ΔF/F per AP, striatum brain slice, 1P widefield, λex=637 nm.
Mean ΔF/F per AP in mouse cortex L2/3 brain slices, 1P widefield, 1.5 W/mm², n=14 cells. Verified against Ext. Fig. 5c source data (mean of 14 cells = 53.45%).

photostabilityData.note: Endpoint of the Ext. Fig. 5e photobleach curve (SomArchon, n=17 cells, 1P widefield): 42.0% remaining at 571 s (9.5 min). 50% remaining is reached at ~7.4 min. (Previously stored as 50% at 10 min; corrected to the actual source-data endpoint — the curve does not extend to 600 s.)
From Ext. Fig. 5e source data, n=17 cells (93.9% remaining at ~61 s).
From Supplementary Figure 2, n=8 cells, 617 nm LED excitation
